name: review
reviewer_timeout_fix: Split 304-file, 86K-line diff into 3 module-scoped reviews (kfs_core, CLI+src, backend+tests) to prevent single-agent context exhaustion

issues_fixed: Deleted broken kfs_core/io.py (stale Pydantic v1 code)
Added None guards in validator rules.py for Optional fields
Added SSRF protection to HttpAssetHandler (IP validation, timeout, size limit)
Fixed cache poisoning via SHA256 URI hashing for filenames
Made Material config consistent with BaseGeometry (extra=forbid)
known_remaining: CylinderGeometry missing from JSON Schema generator
Partial file on download interruption (no atomic write)
